title: The West Bengal Assembly, Before and After 2011
name: West Bengal
intro: For three decades, West Bengal was fought on the 294 constituencies of the 1967/1972 delimitation order. The 2008 delimitation redrew all of them. Plate I presents the retired map in its actual boundaries; Plate II the map that replaced it; Plate III sets the two side by side; Plate IV follows each seat through the change.
The assembly map West Bengal retired in 2011
